page_content:
HESP848 Seminar in Audiology (3 Credits) Research tipics realted to hearing assissment, ampliﬁcation, and audiologic rehabilitation. Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral); Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master's)) ; and permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

HESP788 Graduate Research Externship (1-3 Credits) Off-campus research internship with departmental afﬁliates at National Institutes of Health and other regional universities. Contact department chairman for available placements, requirements and openings. Recommended: HESP724.
